summary: Tested EN/FR/AR translations across all pages, Exit Intent Popup, and Arabic audio generation. Most translations working correctly. Found critical issue: HomePage.jsx does NOT use i18n translations - text is hardcoded in English.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - notification count endpoint not found (cosmetic)

integration_issues.issue: HomePage.jsx does NOT use i18n translations - all text is hardcoded in English. Language switcher works but homepage content doesn't change.

action_items: CRITICAL: Update HomePage.jsx to use useTranslation() hook and t() function for all text content
The i18n.js file already has all translations defined (homepage.title, homepage.subtitle, etc.) but HomePage.jsx doesn't use them
critical_code_review_comments: HomePage.jsx (lines 132-192) has hardcoded English text instead of using t('homepage.title'), t('homepage.subtitle'), etc.
All other pages (PricingPage, HubPage, TradingArenaPage, LessonPage) correctly use i18n translations
context_for_next_testing_agent: HomePage.jsx needs to be updated to use i18n translations. All other translation features are working correctly.

language_switcher.details: Language switcher exists in navbar, switches between EN/FR/AR correctly, RTL direction applied for Arabic

homepage_translations.details: HomePage.jsx does NOT use i18n - text stays in English regardless of language selection. Navbar translates but hero content doesn't.

pricing_page_translations.details: Title 'Choisissez votre parcours' (FR), urgency badge, social proof, testimonials, coupon input all translate correctly

register_page_captcha.details: CAPTCHA displays math question, verifies answer, enables submit button. Labels translate (Security Check / Vérification de sécurité / فحص أمني)

lesson_page_coach_tip.details: Coach's Tip section displays with translations: 'Coach's Tip' (EN), 'Conseil du Coach' (FR), 'نصيحة المدرب' (AR)

hub_page_translations.details: All labels translate: Daily Quests/Quêtes Quotidiennes, Quick Actions/Actions Rapides, Live Market/Marché en Direct

trading_arena_translations.details: All labels translate: Passer un Ordre, Prix du Marché, Historique des Trades, Acheter/Vendre

exit_intent_popup.details: Popup appears when mouse leaves top of page after 5 seconds. Shows 50% OFF offer with urgency timer.

discount_popup_translations.details: Discount popup translates: 'Wait! Get 15% OFF' (EN), 'Attendez ! -15%' (FR), 'انتظر! خصم 15%' (AR)

arabic_audio_generation.details: API /api/media/status returns 23 Arabic audios generated for all lessons (course-foundations-lesson-1 through course-strategist-lesson-7)

rtl_support.details: Arabic pages display RTL correctly - document.dir='rtl' applied, layout mirrors appropriately
